changes.description: Q2 2026 quarterly tender offer completed (expired Jun 18, 2026): 199,367 Shares validly tendered and accepted 100%; aggregate NAV of tendered Shares $4,970,126.10 as of May 31, 2026 Valuation Date; ~$4,912,299.50 paid Jun 26, 2026 (net of applicable early repurchase fees). Tender priced at the already-recorded May 31, 2026 NAV; no new per-share NAV data point.
changes.source_label: SEC SC TO-I/A Final Amendment (acc 0001104659-26-078246, filed 2026-06-26)

changes.description: Q1 2026 quarterly tender offer final results reported (tender deadline Mar 9, 2026): 44,698 Class I + 2,297 Class R Shares validly tendered and accepted 100%; NAV of tendered Shares calculated as of Mar 31, 2026 = $670,910 (Class I) + $33,589 (Class R). Tender priced at the already-recorded Mar 31, 2026 NAV; no new per-share NAV data point.
changes.source_label: SEC SC TO-I/A Final Amendment (acc 0001213900-26-072022, filed 2026-06-25)
